title: Create Manual Backup Before Major Update
description: Developer wants to create a manual backup before deploying a major update, to have a restore point if something goes wrong.
prompt: I'm about to deploy a big update to our website and want to make sure we have a recent backup first. Can you create a manual backup of the entire project right now? Please label it 'pre-update-backup' so I can find it easily if I need to restore.
